content:
One underrated feature that completely changed how I process data.

4 min read
Just now

--

Press enter or click to view image in full size

Stop Solving Today’s Problems With Yesterday’s Habits
The project wasn’t complicated.
At least, that’s what I kept telling myself.
I was building an internal dashboard that processed thousands of API responses every few seconds. Nothing glamorous — just transforming data, validating records, filtering duplicates, calculating statistics, and pushing everything into the UI.
The logic worked.
The performance didn’t.
Every time a new feature landed, another for loop appeared. Then another. Then another.
Some were nested.
Some contained three if statements.
Others were secretly mutating objects that another function depended on.
Three weeks later I opened the file and had absolutely no idea what past me had been thinking.
That was the moment I stopped asking,
“Which loop should I write?”
